name: Salmon Corn Scallop
recipeIngredient: 1 can Cream-style corn (16 or 17 oz. can)
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain and flake the salmon. Set aside.
2. Saute onions and green peppers in 2 tablespoons margarine for 5 - 10 minutes, or until tender.
3. Stir in the flaked salmon, 1 cup cracker crumbs, milk, corn, eggs, cheese, and pepper.
4. Turn the mixture into an 8 x 8 x 2-inch baking dish.
5. Melt remaining margarine; toss with remaining cracker crumbs.
6. Sprinkle over the casserole.
7. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes, or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
Nutrients Per Serving:
Calories: 372
Fat-Total: 17.3 g
Protein: 19.9 g
Cholesterol: 117 mg
Carbohydrates: 35.8 g
Sodium: 824 mg
Dietary Fiber: 2.26 g
